mapper.select:
SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM cctv_infos
SELECT sn AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM security_lights
SELECT sn AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM street_lights
SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, ST_X(location) AS latitude, ST_Y(location) AS longitude FROM cctv_infos
WHERE MBRContains( ST_GeomFromText( 'POLYGON(( ${swLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${swLng}, ${neLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${neLng}, ${swLat} ${swLng} ))', 4326 ), location )
